overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a warrior character traversing a bleak, misty mountain landscape at dusk. The character walks across rocky terrain, passes a carved wooden totem and ruined structure, and continues through a narrow rocky passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain vista with rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the uneven rocky mountain terrain toward the distant horizon

entered.detail: dark jagged rocks and gravel forming the immediate walking surface
layered mountain silhouettes fading into the misty horizon
fog-filled valley visible between the mountain peaks

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a desolate mountain landscape under an overcast dusk sky. The terrain consists of dark rocky ground stretching toward mist-covered mountains in the distance, with no structures or other characters visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge with wooden totem and ruined structure

events.description: tall carved wooden totem pole comes into view on the right side of the path
approaching a ruined wooden longhouse with collapsed roof and stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking toward the ruined structure, passing the wooden totem pole on the right

entered.detail: tall weathered wooden pole with carved details and ropes tied around it
dilapidated wooden structure with broken roof beams and open walls
low wall made of stacked stones alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a ruined wooden settlement on the mountainside. A tall carved totem pole stands prominently on the right as the character walks past stone walls toward a dilapidated longhouse with a partially collapsed roof.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky passage between cliff walls

events.description: entering a narrow passage between tall rock walls
exiting the narrow passage back to open mountain slope

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow rocky passage and continuing down the descending slope

entered.detail: constricted path between two tall rock formations
steep rock faces flanking the narrow path
downward sloping rocky terrain leading into the valley

segments.scene_description: The character passes through a brief narrow passage between rock walls, leaving the ruined structure behind. Emerging from the constriction, the view opens again to a descending rocky slope leading down toward the misty valley below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate mountain landscape that transitions from an open wasteland into a ruined settlement before descending toward a misty valley. It begins with the character traversing dark, rocky ground under an overcast dusk sky, with distant mountains shrouded in thick mist. As the character advances, the terrain shifts toward a ruined wooden settlement, passing a tall carved totem pole and stone walls that lead to a dilapidated longhouse with a collapsed roof. The scene then tightens as the camera follows the character through a narrow passage between towering rock walls, leaving the ruins behind. Finally, the view opens once more as the character emerges from the constriction onto a descending rocky slope that leads down into the hazy depths of the valley below.
